title.en: At this moment, his strength is much stronger t...

content.en:
After a long time, Ye Tian's cultivation officially broke through and stepped into the realm of the half-step sevenfold original ancestor.

At this moment, his strength is much stronger than in the past!

"With my current strength, I'm afraid it's enough to instantly kill a half-step sevenfold ancestor like Xuanqing Dao Ancestor!" Ye Tian smiled slightly, full of confidence.

Subsequently.

It took him some more time to stabilize the realm, and on this day, the Void Tooth Saint Ancestor had also reached the level of impacting the Sixfold Primordial Ancestor, and he had a lot of confidence in impacting the Sixfold Primordial Ancestor.

So, the Void Tooth Holy Ancestor came to pray for a copy of the Purple Xuan Light or the Taixuan Light.

"Endless Dao Ancestor, if I want to impact the Sixfold Origin Ancestor realm, can you give me the light of the Purple Xuan, or the light of the Taixuan?"

The Void Tooth Saint Ancestor bent down and pleaded.

"Yes, but there is only one copy, if you fail, unless you take out the treasure in exchange for the light of Zixuan in the future, you will not be able to exchange it for the light of Zixuan!" Ye Tian solemnly reminded that he would not always give the Void Tooth Holy Ancestor the light of Zixuan, only one copy, and failure would not be given in vain.

If he gives it all for nothing, he won't be able to have more resources!

After all, with the meaning of giving for nothing, the Void Tooth Holy Ancestor will not cherish it, and will attack indiscriminately, and if others do the same in the future, it will be a mess.

"Thank you Endless Dao Ancestor!"

The Void Tooth Holy Ancestor was excited, and hurriedly thanked him.

Immediately, he took a Purple Xuan Light from Ye Tian's hand, and then went back to retreat to impact the Sixfold Origin Ancestor Realm.

In Ye Tian's opinion, even if the Void Tooth Holy Ancestor had made a lot of preparations, the hope of a successful breakthrough was only fifty percent, although it was already a high success rate.

However, if he was unlucky, he still couldn't break through.

It didn't take long for the good news to arrive.

The Void Tooth Saint Ancestor successfully broke through to the Sixfold Origin Ancestor realm, became a Dao Ancestor, and soon joined the Ancient Dao Alliance.

......

Upper Spiritual Gate.

At this moment, the Upper Spirit Saint Ancestor was very envious of the Void Tooth Dao Ancestor.

"Once upon a time, the Void Tooth Dao Ancestor was far less powerful than me, but as a result, the Void Tooth Holy Gate produced an Endless Dao Ancestor, and the Endless Dao Ancestor casually gave some resources, so that the Void Tooth Holy Gate rose directly, and a large number of Fivefold Origin Ancestors were born. Even the Void Tooth Dao Ancestor quickly improved his strength, and soon surpassed me, and now he has ascended to the sky in one step, stepping into the Sixfold Primordial Ancestor!"

The Upper Spirit Holy Ancestor sighed, thinking to himself how good it would be if Ye Tian was a disciple of their Upper Spirit Holy Gate!

Then he can also get his hands dirty, maybe he is already a sixfold Origin Ancestor level Dao Ancestor now!

In the blink of an eye, another period of time has passed.

"The progress of cultivation is too slow, and it is far from touching the second boundary at present!"

Ye Tian frowned, if he didn't have the resources to cultivate, just relying on the Endless Yuan Dao to slowly refine it, the effect was indeed too slow.

this day.

Ye Tian called Han Xuan.

"Master!"

Han Xuan said respectfully.

"Apprentice, do you know about the other side of the Cut Mountain?"

Ye Tian asked.

He had almost determined Han Xuan's identity now, after all, there were so many Dao Ancestors in the Tongtian Origin Domain, and Han Xuan's strength was definitely not weak, at least it was also the realm above the Sixfold Peak Origin Ancestor.

Comprehensively, Han Xuan's identity is clear.

If he hadn't guessed wrong, Han Xuan should have been one of the three half-step sevenfold origin ancestors of the Tongtian Origin Domain Boundary, the Bingxuan Dao Ancestor, and he was also the half-step sevenfold ancestor who had left this area boundary for a long time and passed through the truncated mountain range.

But in the end, Bingxuan Dao Ancestor should have come back again, and he was reincarnated and rebuilt silently, and all of this could not be concealed from Xuanqing Dao Ancestor and other Dao Ancestors.

Therefore, the ancestor who knows the other end of the truncated mountain range best must belong to Han Xuan.

When Han Xuan saw Ye Tian asking about the situation at the other end of the mountain range, he knew that he couldn't hide his identity.

So, she didn't hide it anymore, "Master, I guess you have also guessed, I am indeed the Ice Xuan Dao Ancestor, I left this area a long time ago, passed through the Truncated Mountain Range, and entered another world, which is called the Hanhai District Boundary. The boundary of the Hanhai region is a large regional boundary, in which there are hundreds of thousands of community boundaries, and the so-called community boundary is a small boundary such as the Archean Yuan district boundary. And the Hanhai boundary is just one of thousands of regional boundaries. That piece of heaven and earth is too big, and the half-step sevenfold origin ancestor is nothing, even if he becomes a sevenfold ancestor, he can only become a small overlord in the Hanhai District Realm, and only when he becomes a half-step eightfold ancestor can he rank at the peak level of the Hanhai District Realm. "

"Since you went to the Hanhai District Realm, why did you come back here? Even if you want to be reincarnated and recultivated, wouldn't it be better to be reincarnated and recultivate in the Hanhai District Realm? The cultivation environment there must be better!"

Ye Tian was a little puzzled by this, and he didn't understand why his apprentice made such a choice.

Han Xuan smiled bitterly, "Master, I also want to reincarnate and rebuild in the Hanhai District Realm, but the reincarnation treasure I obtained was snatched and offended a big force. If it is reincarnated and rebuilt in the Hanhai District Boundary, that great force will have a way to find it. There are too many means in the Hanhai Realm, far less than comparable here, even if I am reincarnated and rebuilt, and abandon everything, they can search for me from that reincarnation treasure. Although I have been reincarnated, I have just begun, and the aura of that reincarnation treasure cannot be concealed, so I cannot escape. So, I fled back here as soon as possible. Cutting off Montenegro not only cut off the Silent Black Sea, but also cut off all exploration, so they didn't know I was back here. After I came back, I reincarnated and rebuilt as soon as possible, and even if they really came to find it, it would be a long time since it was over, and it would be impossible to expose it. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian completely understood.

"Master, are you going to the Hanhai District Boundary?" Han Xuan asked.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian didn't hide it, and nodded slightly.

At this time, Han Xuan took out a token: "Master, if you go to the Hanhai District Boundary, you can use this token to join a force in the Hanhai District Realm—Xuanyu Pavilion!"

"Xuanyu Pavilion, what kind of force is this?"

Ye Tian asked.

Han Xuan introduced: "Xuanyu Pavilion is a loose force in the Hanhai District Realm, but its strength is not weak, for newcomers who have just gone to the Hanhai District Realm, Xuanyu Pavilion is definitely one of the best choices. There is no shortage of geniuses and demons in the Hanhai District Realm, of course, a genius like Shizun who has comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao is still lacking! However, geniuses of unknown origin, many big forces do not accept them, and it is too difficult to join powerful forces, but Xuanyu Pavilion is one of the easiest big forces to join. The Xuanyu Pavilion had a total of one half-step eightfold ancestor, hundreds of sevenfold ancestors, and tens of thousands of half-step sevenfold ancestors. If the master joins the Xuanyu Pavilion, he can avoid many detours. And disciple, I used to be a member of the Xuanyu Pavilion, and this token is a membership order that I specifically purchased with points for reincarnation, which can allow an outsider to enter the Xuanyu Pavilion. If the master directly holds it, he can become a member of the Xuanyu Pavilion. When the disciple goes to the Hanhai District boundary in the future, the master can introduce the disciple in. "

"Okay, then I'll take it!"

Ye Tian accepted this Xuanyu Pavilion member order.
